Based on 45 Wall Street analysts who have issued ratings for Microsoft in the last 12 months, the stock has a consensus rating of "Moderate Buy." Out of the 45 analysts, 4 have given a hold rating, 39 have given a buy rating, and 2 have given a strong buy rating for MSFT.

### Consensus Price Target

$593.28

50.70% Upside
